idea-plugin.name: ChordPro
idea-plugin.description:
Syntax highlighting for ChordPro (.cho, .chordpro, .chopro) files via a TextMate grammar.

Part of the ChordSketch project — a Rust implementation of the ChordPro file format.

Features

  • Syntax highlighting for directives, chords, comments, and delegate blocks
  • File type recognition for .cho, .chordpro, and .chopro extensions
  • Bracket matching and auto-closing for { } and [ ]
  • Recognises .irealb / .irealbook (iReal Pro) files as a separate language id; no grammar registered yet
